summary: Default root remains a route/world state. Old-root + source-backed Hero1005/BG1005 is the safer home candidate, but runtime UI_Dock/depth/activity/chat/account state is still required before promotion.

variants.label: default_root_route_state
decisions: No source-backed home runtime lane was applied; this captures the default CSV root route/world active state.

variants.label: oldroot_home_safe_candidate
decisions: Applied source-backed normal-home lane only: UI_bg=PaintingBG_1005 and real Hero1005 SkeletonGraphic animation A.
Did not patch activity slots, chat text, player/account/currency values, UI_Dock promotion, or route/world guardrail nodes.

decisions.finding: Reference image is 1180x526 / 2.243346 while previous captures were 1680x720 / 2.333333.
decisions.action: UI149 captures both variants at 1180x526 for coordinate/framing validation.

decisions.finding: Default root preserves source CSV active state for route/world nodes such as right/node_middle/wanfaWorldNode/worldwanfaBtn/spine_diqiu.
decisions.action: Do not hide guarded route nodes without runtime active/sibling evidence; compare against old-root candidate instead.

decisions.finding: UI_MainInterface_old is the strongest static prefab/open-stack candidate for the attached home reference.
decisions.action: Build a separate candidate scene with only source-backed BG1005 and Hero1005 SkeletonGraphic applied.

decisions.finding: Source-backed UI_Dock renderer/root-canvas candidates compile, but UI136/UI144 visual metrics trail UI128.
decisions.action: Keep UI_Dock promotion blocked pending runtime parent/depth/mask/open-stack evidence.

decisions.finding: Activity slots, chat text, account/profile, and currencies depend on server/account runtime values.
decisions.action: No fake labels, no forced hides, and no currency/chat value patches without UI130-compatible snapshot.

decisions.finding: Static TMP/material lanes are auditable; runtime mask/stencil/effective renderer state still decides final draw order.
decisions.action: Audit actual TMP autosize/material, mask/stencil rows, and SkeletonGraphic bindings in both captures.
